opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel completely drained, my stomach is cramping terribly, and I just can't stop throwing up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe weakness, abdominal pain, and vomiting in a known Type 1 diabetic with recent illness and missed insulin doses.

symptom_narrative.onset: worsening polyuria and thirst over 24 hours, weakness after a mild cold 2 days ago, abdominal pain and vomiting over the last 8 hours
symptom_narrative.character: profound weakness with diffuse crampy abdominal pain and repeated vomiting
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the sickest I've felt in a long time
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: extreme thirst, drinking huge amounts of water, needing to urinate constantly, parent says she seems increasingly drowsy and is breathing fast and deep
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: known Type 1 diabetes, partially skipped insulin doses yesterday because she couldn't keep food down
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, very lethargic, struggling to sit up

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: partially skipped yesterday due to poor oral intake and vomiting

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: parent present and very concerned, recent mild upper respiratory infection 2 days ago

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: parent wants to know if she should just give extra insulin at home to bring the sugar down

access_barriers.transport: parent available to assist but patient too unwell to safely self-transport, ambulance likely needed
